tags.name: xml
tags.description: Generic XML island used inside an MSO conditional comment to wrap Office settings (e.g. `<o:OfficeDocumentSettings>`). Outlook reads these settings; other clients ignore the block because it is gated by `<!--[if gte mso 9]>`.

tags.name: v:rect
tags.description: VML rectangle shape. Most commonly used to render background images in Outlook via `<v:fill type="frame">`.

tags.name: v:roundrect
tags.description: VML rectangle with rounded corners. The cornerstone of bulletproof Outlook buttons.

tags.name: v:oval
tags.description: VML ellipse or circle shape.

tags.name: v:line
tags.description: VML straight line between two points.

tags.name: v:arc
tags.description: VML circular arc.

tags.name: v:curve
tags.description: VML Bezier curve defined by two control points and an endpoint.

tags.name: v:polyline
tags.description: VML connected sequence of line segments.

tags.name: v:fill
tags.description: Defines the fill of a parent VML shape. Use `type="frame"` with `src` to render a background image in Outlook.

tags.name: v:stroke
tags.description: Defines the stroke (outline) of a parent VML shape.

tags.name: v:shadow
tags.description: Drop shadow effect on a parent VML shape.

tags.name: v:image
tags.description: VML image. Useful for images that need exact positioning in Outlook.

tags.name: v:imagedata
tags.description: Image data reference inside a parent VML shape (typically `<v:shape>`).

tags.name: v:shape
tags.description: VML custom shape defined by a path or a referenced shapetype.

tags.name: v:shapetype
tags.description: Reusable VML shape definition referenced by `<v:shape type>`.

tags.name: v:textbox
tags.description: Text container inside a VML shape. `inset` controls internal padding.

tags.name: v:textpath
tags.description: VML text rendered along a path - rarely used in modern email.

tags.name: v:group
tags.description: Groups child VML shapes so they share a coordinate system.

tags.name: v:background
tags.description: VML background shape for the document. Limited support in Outlook.

tags.name: v:formulas
tags.description: Container for `<v:f>` formula definitions used in custom VML shapes.

tags.name: v:handles
tags.description: Container for VML shape adjustment handles.

tags.name: v:path
tags.description: Defines a custom VML drawing path.

tags.name: o:OfficeDocumentSettings
tags.description: Container for Outlook/Office rendering settings. Place inside an `<xml>` block within an `<!--[if gte mso 9]>` conditional comment.

tags.name: o:AllowPNG
tags.description: Tells Outlook to render PNG images (rather than converting them to a different format). Self-closing flag tag.

tags.name: o:PixelsPerInch
tags.description: Sets the DPI Outlook uses to render the document. `96` matches standard web rendering and prevents Outlook from up-scaling images on high-DPI displays.

tags.name: o:DoNotRelyOnCSS
tags.description: Forces Outlook to render using its legacy Word engine rather than relying on CSS. Rarely needed in modern email.

tags.name: o:TargetScreenSize
tags.description: Hints to Outlook the target screen size for layout decisions.

tags.name: o:UseFELayout
tags.description: Enables Far-East layout features for Asian language rendering.

tags.name: o:OLEObject
tags.description: Embedded OLE object reference - used for legacy embedded controls.

tags.name: o:lock
tags.description: Locks shape transformations on a parent VML shape.

tags.name: o:p
tags.description: Office paragraph marker. Outlook inserts these around content - usually safe to leave alone.

tags.name: o:shapedefaults
tags.description: Default attribute values applied to all VML shapes without explicit values.

tags.name: o:shapelayout
tags.description: Layout container for shape ID maps.

tags.name: o:idmap
tags.description: Maps shape IDs to layout regions.

tags.name: w:anchorlock
tags.description: Anchors a VML shape so its full area is clickable. Required inside bulletproof button markup so the entire `<v:roundrect>` becomes a hit target.

globalAttributes.name: xmlns:v
globalAttributes.description: VML namespace declaration. Required on `<html>` when using `<v:*>` tags. Use the value `urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml`.

globalAttributes.name: xmlns:o
globalAttributes.description: Office namespace declaration. Required on `<html>` when using `<o:*>` tags. Use the value `urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office`.

globalAttributes.name: xmlns:w
globalAttributes.description: Word namespace declaration. Required on `<html>` when using `<w:*>` tags. Use the value `urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:word`.
